privileged_info_summary: The employee roster CSV contains 7 fictional character records with verified mappings for Sarah Connor (s.connor@cyberdyne.com) to department R&D (Attribute_1), location San Francisco (Attribute_2), and manager Miles Dyson (Attribute_3). The task requires using LimeSurvey's correct piping syntax {TOKEN:ATTRIBUTE_1} to display participant attributes in survey text.
